title: microlicia latifolia
intro: Microlicia latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved microlicia, is a plant species native to Brazil. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microlicia latifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for topical and internal use, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine.
